title: Desert island papers-A life in variance parameter and quantitative genetic parameter estimation reviewed using 16 papers.
journal_full: Journal of animal breeding and genetics = Zeitschrift fur Tierzuchtung und Zuchtungsbiologie
abstract: I review my scientific career in terms of eight areas and 16 papers. The first two areas are associated with childhood. The other six are associated with residual maximum likelihood (REML), canonical transformation, inbreeding in selected populations, average information residual maximum likelihood (AIREML), the computer program ASReml and sampling-based estimation.
